---
title: "About Me"
image: IMG_0560.JPG
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/tan-ying-hui23/?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Ad_flagship3_profile_view_base_contact_details%3ByB3dxP8gQESEyO24EnDJ%2BA%3D%3D
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/yingghui23

---

Hi, I'm Ying Hui. I am a student double-majoring in **Industrial Engineering and Statistics**.

This blog is my digital sandbox where I combine my ISE background with data analytics to solve practical and unpractical problems. My toolkit is split into two main worlds:

* **The R Toolkit (Design of Experiments):** I use R to set up rigorous statistical experiments (DOE). This is where we deliberately change inputs in a system (like process variables) to figure out exactly what drives performance and cuts variance.
* **The Python Toolkit (Machine Learning):** I use Python to build predictive models and machine learning pipelines—tinkering with things like Random Forests and hyperparameter tuning to forecast outcomes and optimize decisions.

Ultimately, this space is a collection of my project walk-throughs, engineering deep dives, and data experiments. Thanks for stopping by!

## Education

National University of Singapore
Bachelor of Engineering, Industrial and Systems Engineering, Second Major in Statistics | Aug 2023 - May 2027

## Experience 

ED&C               | Accounts Servicing Intern              | Jan 2023 - Mar 2023

ASTM International | Advanced Manufacturing Research Intern | Jun 2025 - Dec 2025

Applied Materials  | Digital Twin and Warehouse POU Intern  | Jul 2026 - Dec 2026
